chunks.subject: Aerial view of a mountain range from a small plane
chunks.action: From inside a small aircraft, the camera captures a vast, forested mountain range below. The shot then tilts up, revealing more of the clear blue sky and the edge of the plane's white wing. The reflection of the occupants is visible on the window.

setting.location: Aerial over Grand Teton National Park

chunks.audio_character: The loud, droning sound of a small airplane engine.
chunks.editorial_notes: Excellent establishing or transitional B-roll. Useful for showcasing the grand scale of the environment and setting an adventurous tone.

key_moments.description: Wide aerial shot of the forested mountain valley.
The camera tilts up, revealing the plane's wing against the blue sky.
